Progress Report Re: Notice & Acknowledgement Of Receipt Of Money Into A Blocked Account.
Off Calendar Aug-05-2013 Off Calendar

Progress Report Re: Notice & Acknowledgement Of Receipt Of Money Into A Blocked Account.
Off Calendar Jul-16-2013 Continued To Aug-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-28-2013 Off Calendar

Petition To Approve Compromise Of Pending Action (Minor)
Off Calendar May-21-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Paul H. Alvarado; Clerk: Kevin Dougherty; CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Roger S. Reynolds, Esq. appeared with petitioner Perry Tomei, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor Benjamin Tomei, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined. The minor was placed under oath but did not testify.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Settlement Amount - $75,000.00.
Attorney Fees - $18,432.53.
Medical Expenses - 13,983.80.

The net balance of $42,584.67 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, located at 2055 Chestnut Street, San Francisco, CA 94123. No withdrawals shall be made without a written Court Order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.

Orders Approving the Compromise of a Disputed Claim of a Minor, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

Matter is CONTINUED to July 16, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. for Progress Report re: Notice and Acknowledgemnt of Deposit of Money into a Blocked Account.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-24-2013 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jun-11-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
